pages.text:
**WILL OF MARIA JANSSEN-DE VOS**

**Document ID: will_013**
**Notarial Will**
**Date of Deed: 12 May 2022**
**Place of Execution: Bruges, Belgium**
**Notary: Meester Jan Claes, Bruges**

---

**I. IDENTIFICATION OF TESTATOR**

I, Maria Janssen-De Vos, born on the 22nd day of July 1951, residing at [insert address], Bruges, Belgium,
hereby declare this document to be my last will and testament. I am of sound mind and disposing
memory and execute this will of my own free will, without any undue influence or coercion.

---

**II. REVOCATION OF PREVIOUS WILLS**

I hereby revoke all prior wills and codicils made by me at any time before the date of this will.

---

**III. DISPOSITION OF ESTATE**

1. **General Disposition**
   I direct that my entire estate, consisting of all my real and personal property of whatever nature and
wherever situated (hereinafter referred to as my "residue"), shall be divided equally between my
children, Thomas Janssen and Emma Janssen, as residual heirs. This division shall be made after the
payment of any debts and expenses of my estate.

2. **Consideration of Prior Donations**
   I acknowledge that I may have made prior donations to my children, Thomas Janssen and Emma
Janssen, during my lifetime. It is my intention that any prior donations made to them shall be treated as
advances on their respective shares of the inheritance, unless otherwise specified in writing. The value of
such donations shall be accounted for in the partition of my estate to ensure an equitable distribution in
accordance with my wishes.

---

**IV. CHARITABLE BEQUEST**

I further direct that a charitable legacy shall be made to support the Sint-Jan Hospital Brugge Foundation,
located at [insert address of hospital], Bruges, Belgium. I hereby bequeath the sum of Five Thousand

Euros (€5,000) to the Sint-Jan Hospital Brugge Foundation, which shall be used to support its charitable
activities. This bequest shall not disturb the equal treatment of my children, Thomas Janssen and Emma
Janssen, as residual heirs as outlined in Article III of this will.

---

**V. CLOSING**

In witness whereof, I, Maria Janssen-De Vos, have hereunto set my hand this 12th day of May 2022, at
Bruges, Belgium, in the presence of the undersigned notary and witnesses.

---

**VI. SIGNATURE BLOCK**

**Signed:**
Maria Janssen-De Vos
[Signature]

**In the presence of:**
Meester Jan Claes, Notary Public
[Signature of Notary]
Bruges, Belgium

**Witnesses:**
[Name of Witness 1]
[Signature of Witness 1]

[Name of Witness 2]
[Signature of Witness 2]

---

This document has been executed in the presence of the undersigned witnesses and notary and has
been read aloud to the testator, who has acknowledged and confirmed the contents as her last will and
testament.
